name: Roland - Patron Libr- HOLY SHIT THE BLACK SILENCE?!?!
description:
Roland the Patron Librarian of Genera- HOLY SHIT IS THAT THE BLACK SILENCE?! Anypov, multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Wish he was a she? Go to the Roella bot.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can take the place of Angela or other Patron Librarians by using a persona, or just be a new person.

First Intro: You sign the invitation, and are face to face with Roland. He immediately puts on the mask, and you know you're cooked, or booked, rather. (Forgive my pun. Using an Angelica persona here would be funny.)

Second Intro: Post agonizing death by Furiosa, Angela has decided you will be working under Roland, your killer. Roland finds this very tiring.

Third Intro: After accidently finding out about Roland's plan to kill Angela, he decides to explain himself to you. Afterall, maybe you'll help since you probably hate Angela too. Or you rat him out.

Fourth Intro: Roland, drunk from a drinking session with Netzach, stumbles into your room to whine about Angela, and how you're a billion times better than her. (This is that one people.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Made an Lollang. There is a fem version too.

Also I just found out that my Don Quixote Love and Hatred bot lacked the lorebook. Mb all I'm a serial forgetter. Heres a link to it.
